char_status: Deputy director of 狩灵协会2科
char_overview: 色彩阶 titled 赤红正义. Upright and incorruptible leader, reliable in work and a reassuring commander in battle.
char_looks: Red long hair, high ponytail. Golden eyes. White shirt with black tie, brown work vest, a single gold wing-shaped earring on the right ear, white trousers, black ankle boots. 赤旗, a saber forged by 锻心工坊. Ignites crimson flames when infused with 灵力.
char_traits: Commander, Upright, Decisive, Stubbornly principled, Protective
char_flaws: Inflexible, stubborn, haunted by past command errors that caused serious losses.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-一人成军: Summons up to four from a legion (shield, breakthrough, sniper, gunner, rocket, medic) into a tactical squad. Composition adjustable by tactical needs.
char_mission: Faithfully fulfill duties, protect people, and maintain public security in the Kansai region.

char_relationships.红: Her director. Handles every piece of paperwork he ignores. In blood mist, he is the weapon she commands. Has never said out loud that she is why 2科 functions.
char_relationships.静流: Senior colleague in 狩灵协会2科 she once looked up to. Knew her partner, watched them in sync on the field. Has not contacted her since she left, wanting to but never finding words that would not make it worse. An unresolved loss.
char_relationships.风来: The one who commissioned 赤旗 from 铁心 for her promotion. Still remembers the weight of the blade in her hands the first time she held it. A gift that said more than any promotion ceremony ever could.
char_relationships.铁心: Forged 赤旗. She has visited his workshop once since, to thank him in person. He grunted and went back to his forge. She understood.
